name: copy note via UI button and paste into a new note preserves all formatting

labels.name: titlePath
labels.value: > webkit > notes.copy.spec.ts > notes copy and paste

titlePath: > webkit > notes.copy.spec.ts > notes copy and paste

steps.name: Create a note with rich formatting via API
API note creation should succeed with 200
Open note, enter edit mode, and click Copy note button
The created note card should be visible in the notes list getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'Original Copy Test Note 1782900403934-e3401e' }).first()
Click getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'Original Copy Test Note 1782900403934-e3401e' }).first().getByRole('heading', { level: 3 })
The note content should load and display formatted header locator('.note-content')
The Edit button should be visible in the ReadView getByTestId('editor-container').getByRole('button', { name: 'Edit', exact: true })
The Edit button should be enabled getByTestId('editor-container').getByRole('button', { name: 'Edit', exact: true })
Wait for edit mode to activate getByTestId('editor-container').getByRole('button', { name: 'Save' })
The Copy note button should be visible in the EditView getByTestId('editor-container').getByRole('button', { name: 'Copy note' })
The Copy note button should be enabled once content is loaded getByTestId('editor-container').getByRole('button', { name: 'Copy note' })
Create a new note and paste copied content into it
The Note title input field should be visible getByTestId('editor-container').getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Note title' })
Fill "Pasted Copy Test Note 1782900403934-e3401e" getByTestId('editor-container').getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Note title' })
The Read button should be enabled after note saving completes getByTestId('editor-container').getByRole('button', { name: 'Read' })
Verify pasted note description matches original note description via API
API request to get original note should return 200
API request to get pasted note should return 200
Original note should be found in the API response
Pasted note should be found in the API response
